---
title: "Quickstart"
---

## 1) Setup

```bash
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -e .[dev]
cp .env.example .env
```

## 2) Run checks

```bash
ruff check .
ruff format --check .
pytest
```

## 3) Run pipeline

```bash
python -m bharat_market_pulse.report_pipeline
```

The pipeline supports degraded mode (missing API keys, missing image, OCR/LLM failure) and still produces a report with warnings.
